zh.lifeSummary: 當Hervey de Stafford II於1178年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾卡素 邱奇時，他的父親Hervey Bagot II25歲，母親Millicent de Stafford22歲。他於1212年9月29日與Petronell de Ferrers結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1237年12月5日在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾史東。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Hervey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from a Breton personal name composed of haer ‘battle’ + vy ‘worthy’. It was introduced to Britain by Bretons who settled in East Anglia and elsewhere in the wake of the Norman Conquest.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Hervey de Stafford II was born in 1178, in Castle Church, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hervey Bagot II, was 25 and his mother, Millicent de Stafford, was 22. He married Petronell de Ferrers on 29 September 1212. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 5 December 1237, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Stone, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hervey de Stafford II est né en 1178, à Castle Church, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hervey Bagot II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Millicent de Stafford, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Petronell de Ferrers le 29 septembre 1212. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 5 décembre 1237, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Stone, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hervey de Stafford IIが1178年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアカストル チャーチで生まれた時，父Hervey Bagot IIは25歳，母Millicent de Staffordは22歳であった。1212年9月29日にPetronell de Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1237年12月5日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Stafford Castle, Stafford, Staffordshire: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드 스트 채드
ko.lifeSummary: Hervey de Stafford II(이)가 1178년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 카스틀 처르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hervey Bagot II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Millicent de Stafford(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1212년 9월 29일 Petronell de Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1237년 12월 5일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스톤에 묻혔다.

ru.Stafford Castle, Stafford, Staffordshire: стаффорд ст чэд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hervey de Stafford II родился в 1178 г. в местности кастл чурч, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hervey Bagot II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent de Stafford, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronell de Ferrers 29 сентября 1212 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 5 декабря 1237 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности стоун, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
